title: thrixspermum changlangensis
intro: Thrixspermum changlangensis, also known as the Changlang orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid found in the northeastern region of India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The Changlang orchid is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as improving respiratory and cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed to leverage its health benefits and medicinal properties.
